name: Animal Cohort Setup and Acclimation
preprompt: Specify the mouse cohort requirements for the study: male C57BL/6J strain, age 12 months at treatment start, vendor/source consistency, health status, acclimation period, cage density, environmental conditions, and baseline weight/health recording. Include inclusion/exclusion criteria before randomization and the handling of any pre-existing illness.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components. Write: own data only.
summary: Establishes the eligible aged male mouse cohort and standardizes baseline conditions before treatment begins.
